title: Lomo Saltado Stir Fry
description: A Peruvian-inspired beef stir fry with garlicky flavors. Perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet. Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the beef back into the skillet and stir in the stir-fry sauce and seasoning.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the beef and sauce over cooked rice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
